title: Beat Slicer
description:
WELCOME TO THE HORIZON.

Beat//Slicer is a retro-future rhythm experience designed to put you in the zone.

Drag in your favorite Music File, select your settings, and watch the neon grid come alive. Using procedural audio analysis, Beat//Slicer generates a unique track for every song you load. Slice directional arrows, dodge misses, and keep your combo multiplier high as the visuals beat to the beats.

HOW WILL YOU SLICE?

• Chill or Sweat: Choose Omni-Directional Mode for a flowing, low-stress session, or step up to Challenge Mode, which requires holding specific keys while slicing.

• Play Your Way: Supports mouse swipe, keyboard button taps, controllers, or multi-touch on supported screens.

• Make it Yours: Choose between default neon synthwave graphics or upload a custom background. with more grid and blocks customization.

• Infinite Replayability: Share seed names with your friends to play the exact same generated block layouts on the same songs and compete for the highest score!
description_short: Slice through the rhythm in Beat//Slicer, a hyper-reactive synthwave rhythm game where your music controls the action. Load any track, customize your grid, and choose from three distinct game modes. Slice with precision, build your multiplier, and master the neon horizon.
